name: sesh
title: sesh
description: Browse and resume coding agent sessions across OpenCode, Claude Code, and more
author: dru89

commands.name: search-sessions
commands.title: Search Sessions
commands.subtitle: sesh
commands.description: Search and resume coding agent sessions

preferences.name: seshPath
preferences.title: sesh Binary Path
preferences.description: Path to the sesh binary. Leave empty to use the default from PATH.

preferences.name: terminal
preferences.title: Terminal Application
preferences.description: Which terminal to use when resuming a session

preferences.name: customTerminalCommand
preferences.title: Custom Terminal Command
preferences.description: AppleScript or shell command to open a terminal and run a command. Use {cmd} as placeholder for the resume command. Only used when Terminal is set to Custom.
